channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Pixel art 2.5D narrative adventure Beyond the Plastic Wall announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
Publisher ARTE France and developer Motvind Studios have announced Beyond the Plastic Wall, a pixel art 2.5D narrative adventure game where players explore a broken yet beautiful world. It will launch for PC via Steam in 2026.

Here is an overview of the game, via ARTE France:

About

In Beyond the Plastic Wall, you play as Hal, a young scavenger who finds a sealed box of mysterious letters written by a woman he doesn’t know. This woman lives deep within the walls of the last city at the end of the world, so he decides to set off on a journey looking for her.

His search will take him through the many varied horizons of this strange world, from its lonely, abandoned outskirts to the narrow alleys and bustling skyscrapers of a city filled with grim secrets. And like any good scavenger, Hal can’t resist trying to fix the wrecked machines he encounters along the way.

A Poetic 2.5D Adventure in a Broken World

Embark on a gorgeous 2.5D view pixel art adventure across rocky shores, vast, forgotten structures and lush, windy plains lovingly created by blending hand-crafted art with innovative and cutting edge rendering techniques.

Throughout your journey, you will come across many characters that this crumbling world have pulled apart: from a voyage with a proud but lonely boat captain to a confrontation with an angry fishmonger and unsettling brushes with the strange outcasts that hide in the shadows of the walled city. Each of their tales brings you a little closer to the letters’ mysterious author and nearer to understanding the true reasons for your own voyage.

Unlock the Secrets of Tech-Nostalgic Puzzles

To a scavenger like Hal, machines have as much to tell him as humans do.

On your way towards The City you’ll encounter many broken devices, corrupted consoles and malfunctioning vehicles impeding your progress that need repairing. Manipulate a varied range of mechanical puzzles to move forward and uncover the secrets of this continent.

A rusty boat engine, a coded telephone machine, a mysterious archive computer: every puzzle is a unique challenge that works on a shared logic that you get to know as you unlock their satisfying and complex machinery.

Key features

  • A Detailed and Unique 2.5D Pixel Art World – Immerse yourself in a stunning world that blends pixel art with modern special effects. Each environment has been designed with remarkable attention to detail to offer you a truly unique visual experience.
  • Clever Mechanical Puzzles – Interact with a variety of machines and solve intuitive and satisfying puzzles, designed to stimulate both your powers of observation and logic. Every mechanic will challenge you to understand, experiment with and manipulate its components in order to continue your adventure.
  • A Rich Narrative Adventure Filled With Captivating Characters – Lose yourself in a layered, thoughtful story about the inevitability of change, the tragedy of decay and the things that can and can’t be fixed. About failure, guilt and fear of the future – and the necessity of learning to pick up the pieces of yourself after being broken.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/pixel-art-2-5d-narrative-adventure-beyond-the-plastic-wall-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: ‘High-octane 2D gun-fu action game’ NOIR BLOOM announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
HONKI Games has announced NOIR BLOOM, a “high-octane 2D gun-fu action game.” It will launch for PC via Steam in 2027.

Here is an overview of the game, via HONKI Games:

About

“A lone charge into the dragon’s den, where gunfire ignites the deadly dance again.”

NOIR BLOOM is a high-octane 2D gun-fu action game, where adrenaline-fueled gunfights and skull-crushing close combat collide in a neo-noir rhapsody. Embark on a deadly rampage to honor the vow—strike, disarm, and turn foes into weapons. Every move is a calculated ballet of bullets and blood.

Key Features

  • NOIR BLOOM Seals Your Fate, and There’s No Escape – The girl who reignited your fractured humanity has been taken by a ruthless crime lord. For her, you will become the “White Wraith” once more, to settle the blood debts of your past. This is not a hero’s tale. It’s Kow Wing’s own bloody verse.
  • A Splash of Red, a Split Second From Death – Enter the fray with iron fists, seize their guns to turn the tide, counter their attacks and seal their fate. Choreograph every move in your head, then perform it as a live-fire ballet of bullets and blood.
  • The Dragon’s Eye of Orientis—A City That Never Sleeps – Skyscrapers cast long shadows where neon cuts through the night. Sin and desire run rampant in the eastern metropolis of “Kow Wing.” Sprint through shanties, downtown markets, and opulent towers—waging a blood-soaked battle amidst the vibrant, living pulse of Kow Wing’s streets.

Watch the reveal trailer and a teaser trailer below.

“First Bloom” Reveal Trailer

First Look Clip



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/high-octane-2d-gun-fu-action-game-noir-bloom-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Spooky Spirit Shooting Gallery coming to Switch 2 on August 6 in Japan
item.content:encoded:
• Switch 2

Currently available for Switch worldwide.

Nippon Columbia will release a Switch 2 version of Spooky Spirit Shooting Gallery on August 6 in Japan for 5,280 yen, the publisher announced.

Spooky Spirit Shooting Gallery first launched for Switch on July 1, 2021 in Japan, where it is titled Moshikashite? Obake no Shatekiya. A western release followed via publisher Aksys Games on April 27, 2023.

The Switch 2 version is a port of the Switch version, which itself is a home console adaptation of the medal game originally launched in July 2019, with the the addition of GameShare and GameChat support.

Here is an overview of the game, via Aksys Games:

Shoot to defeat the Spooky Spirits!

Aim carefully and shoot non-stop in Carnival Mode. Fire at the goodies in the gallery or the ghosts in the haunted house—Choose either stage and take aim to defeat the spirits. Test your skills with many minigames in Party Mode and play with up to three players. Unlock the Spirit Stairway Challenge for more games and ghosts! The higher you go, the tougher it becomes.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/spooky-spirit-shooting-gallery-coming-to-switch-2-on-august-6-in-japan
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Silent Hill f shipments and digital sales top two million
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

New major milestone achieved.

Total shipments and digital sales for Silent Hill f have surpassed two million units worldwide as of April 22, Konami announced.

Silent Hill f launched for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam, Epic Games Store, and Microsoft Store on September 25, 2025, and surpassed one million units within a day of release.

Here is an overview of the game, via Konami:

About

In 1960s Japan, Shimizu Hinako’s secluded town of Ebisugaoka is consumed by a sudden fog, transforming her home into a haunting nightmare.

As the town falls silent and the fog thickens, Hinako must navigate the twisted paths of Ebisugaoka, solving complex puzzles and confronting grotesque monsters to survive.

Immerse yourself into Hinako’s world imagined by renowned author Ryukishi07, with entrancing music, including pieces by Akira Yamaoka, and beautiful visuals in a gripping tale of doubt, regret, and inescapable choices. Will Hinako embrace the beauty hidden within terror, or succumb to the madness that lies ahead?

Discover a new chapter in the Silent Hill series, blending psychological horror with a haunting Japanese setting.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/silent-hill-f-shipments-and-digital-sales-top-two-million
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: 2.5D story-driven turn-based RPG Echoes of the Flame announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

The journeys of two parties unfold through alternating perspectives.

Solo independent Japanese game developer Konno Tobari has announced Echoes of the Flame, a 2.5D story-driven turn-based RPG built on RPG Developer Bakin. It will launch for PC via Steam in November to December with Japanese language support, and will add English and Simplified Chinese language support in 2027.

Here is an overview of the game, via Konno Tobari:

About

A story-driven 2.5D turn-based RPG where the journeys of two parties unfold through alternating perspectives.

Two Journeys, Guided by Fire

In a world where the cycle of souls exists, “Flame Wardens” are sworn to protect it.

Haku, a Flame Warden from a town at the western edge, journeys toward the heart of the land—the sacred peak of Coral—to fulfill his duty, joined by his demi-human best friend Kaji and Mikoto, an enigmatic former mafia member.

From a town at the eastern edge, Ren, another Flame Warden, sets out for the sacred peak of Coral, joined by his childhood friend Maruka and a mysterious elder named Rakan.

Two journeys, unfolding through alternating perspectives. What awaits them at journey’s end?

  • ❮
  • ❯

Unlock Hidden Truths with “Key Words”

Discover “Key Words” throughout your journey. Present them to the right people to unlock the world’s hidden lore. Which words will you choose—and to whom? Rely on your intuition and reasoning to piece together the story.

Strategic Combat Shaped by Flexible Builds and “Shields”

A turn-based command battle system enhanced with unique strategic elements. No random encounters—every battle is a carefully crafted tactical challenge.

  • “Shields” That Dictate the Flow of Battle – Every combatant has a “Shield” that reduces incoming HP damage. At the start of battle, focus on wearing down enemy shields, then shift to damaging HP as the situation evolves. The choice—wear down their shields or strike at their HP—can turn the tide of battle.
  • Flexible Ability Builds – Traditional leveling has been replaced with a system where you allocate “Combat Points” earned through story progression. Customize your characters by assigning Combat Points to active skills, passive abilities, and stat boosts to suit your strategy.
  • Status Effects and Gear Customization – When enabled by gear, status buildup accumulates with each attack, eventually triggering status effects in a Soulslike-inspired system. It can become a powerful advantage even against formidable foes. Slot “Spirit Stones” into your weapons and armor to create highly personalized gear—such as builds focused on shield-breaking or inflicting status effects.

(An “Easy Mode” is also planned for players who prefer to focus on the story and exploration.)

Estimated Playtime

10 to 15 hours (may vary depending on playstyle and exploration).

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer

English

Japanese

Simplified Chinese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/2-5d-story-driven-turn-based-rpg-echoes-of-the-flame-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
